item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Don't Let The Sun Go Down On Me - Elton John - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Don't Let The Sun Go Down On Me from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Elton John. Chords: Am7, A♭, B♭, C, C7, D7, Dm7, F, G, G7.

item.title: Miss Oli: Thinking Of You - Katy Perry - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song Thinking Of You from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Katy Perry. Chords: A, Bm, D, Em, G, Gm.

item.title: ukulele plus: Rave On - Buddy Holly - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Rave On from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: Buddy Holly. Chords: C, D, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: She - Elvis Costello - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song She from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Elvis Costello. Chords: A7, A♭, B♭, C, C7, D, D7, Dm, Dm7/G, D♭, E♭, E♭dim7, F, Fm, G7.

item.title: UNI Modern Band: Creep - Radiohead - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Creep from the channel UNI Modern Band. Artist: Radiohead. Chords: B, C, Cm, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Sabor A Mi - Eydie Gorme & Luis Miguel
item.description: Play along video for the song Sabor A Mi from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artists: Eydie Gorme & Luis Miguel. Chords: B♭, B♭7, Cm, Cm7, Dm7, D♭dim, E♭, E♭m, F(♯5), F7, Fm7, G7.

item.title: Ukulele Nick: Mr. Joe - Nikos Voutsinas
item.description: Play along video for the song Mr. Joe from the channel Ukulele Nick. Artist: Nikos Voutsinas. Chords: A7, B13, B♭13, C13, C7, C7♯9, Dm7, F9, F♯dim7, G7.

item.title: Skye C. Hale: Soldier Boy - The Shirelles
item.description: Play along video for the song Soldier Boy from the channel Skye C. Hale. Artist: The Shirelles. Chords: A, A7, D, E, F♯m.

item.title: Miss Oli: Halik - Aegis - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song Halik from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Aegis. Chords: A, Bm, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Brave - Sara Bareilles - Key of F
item.description: Play along video for the song Brave from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Sara Bareilles. Chords: B♭, C, C7, Csus4, Dm, F.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Ashokan Farewell - Jay Ungar
item.description: Play along video for the song Ashokan Farewell from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Jay Ungar. Chords: Am, C, C7, Dm, Em, F, G7.

item.title: Skye C. Hale: 6 Months Later - Megan Moroney - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song 6 Months Later from the channel Skye C. Hale. Artist: Megan Moroney. Chords: C, D, Em, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Umbrella - Rihanna - Key of F
item.description: Play along video for the song Umbrella from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Rihanna. Chords: Am, C, E7, F.

item.title: Miss Oli: Bye Bye - Mariah Carey - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Bye Bye from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Mariah Carey. Chords: Am, Bm, C, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Concerning Hobbits - Howard Shore - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Concerning Hobbits from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Howard Shore. Chords: A, B, Bm, C, D, Dsus4, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Going Home - Mark Knopfler - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Going Home from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Mark Knopfler. Chords: A7, Am, B7, Bm, C, C♯m7♭5, D, D7, Em, G.

item.title: ukulele plus: Sweet City Woman - The Stampeders
item.description: Play along video for the song Sweet City Woman from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: The Stampeders. Chords: Am, C, D7, G.

item.title: ucanlele (ukulele tutorial): Leaving On A Jetplane - John Denver - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Leaving On A Jetplane from the channel ucanlele (ukulele tutorial). Artist: John Denver. Chords: C, D, G.

item.title: Skye C. Hale: End Of Beginning - Djo
item.description: Play along video for the song End Of Beginning from the channel Skye C. Hale. Artist: Djo. Chords: A, Bm, D.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Laughter In The Rain - Neil Sedaka - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Laughter In The Rain from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Neil Sedaka. Chords: A7, Am7, B♭m7, B♭maj7, Cm7, Cmaj7, D, D7sus4, Em7, E♭, E♭7, F7, G, Gm7.
